title: E.U. revels in defeat of Hungary’s Orban, Trump ally who defied Brussels
summary_full: The Hungarian prime minister, a self-proclaimed champion of illiberal Christian democracy, turned thwarting E.U. policy into an art form but suffered a resounding election defeat.
summary_public: The Hungarian prime minister, a self-proclaimed champion of illiberal Christian democracy, turned thwarting E.U. policy into an art form but suffered a resounding election defeat.

BE.label: positive
BE.evidence: E.U. revels in defeat of Hungary’s Orban
